notes:
Fixed a scoring quirk for knockout matches that go to extra time or penalties.

Previously, your score prediction (exact score / goal difference / correct outcome) was always judged at the 90-minute mark, even if the match carried on into extra time. That meant a correct 90-minute prediction could look wrong once the final scoreline included extra-time goals.

Now, for matches decided after extra time or on penalties, your score prediction is judged against the score at the end of extra time instead of at 90 minutes. Matches decided in normal time are unaffected. The advancing-team bonus was already correct and is unchanged. See the Rules page for the updated wording and a worked example.
